aboutText: "Hi, I'm Chanchal Tailor — a first-year B.Tech student at MBM University. I'm passionate about web development. I love turning ideas into projects, and this portfolio is my first step. Always learning, always building."

userProjects.title: Interactive Fluid Canvas V1
userProjects.description: A high-fidelity hardware-accelerated interactive particle system with real-time mouse-interaction wave mechanics, dynamic lighting modifiers, and performance-tuned mobile viewport adaptivity.

userProjects.title: Modular Tactile Design System
userProjects.description: A comprehensive organic component playground emphasizing luxurious negative space, flawless page state transitions, fluid scaling fonts, and deep-contrast dark interfaces.

userProjects.title: Cosmic Kinetic Studio
userProjects.description: Immersive 3D stellar orbital sandbox simulating solar system orbital physics with editable gravity multipliers, camera focal transitions, and reactive typography systems.
